markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, competitive positioning, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Competitive Content Approved:** Flosum will test 1–2 competitive comparison articles weekly to own its narrative in search and AI, shifting from a conservative stance driven by leadership and sales team needs.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**New Messaging Focus:** Content will adopt an enterprise focus, shifting from technical features to business outcomes like "protecting your Salesforce investment," and will subtly promote cloud solutions without denigrating the native product.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [**January Performance Strong:** Security content is ranking well (avg. position on page 1), non-branded keyword traffic is growing, and a Flosum article was the first citation in a Google AI Overview.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Renewal Strategy:** Matt gave a positive "gut check" on the April renewal, pending a formal strategy review with Garish in mid-February.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & Approvals

  - [A January content backlog (due to a team emergency) is cleared, with 24 articles publishing this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [46 new assignment ideas are in Airtable for review, tagged by focus (e.g., "exec") and type (new/refresh).](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Competitive Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Competitors are defining the narrative in search and AI by writing comparison articles targeting Flosum keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Rationale for Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Leadership is pushing for more direct competitive content, citing the sales team's daily need for it.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Listicles are a strategic play for AI visibility, as LLMs frequently cite them.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [This strategy allows Flosum to own its narrative and drive traffic to its own site.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [**Test:** Publish 1–2 competitive articles weekly to monitor performance.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [**Tone:** Use "crafty" positioning (e.g., highlight Flosum's strengths without naming competitors) and "edgy" spins.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Review:** Sydnie will provide a technical review to ensure accuracy and strategic positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### New Messaging: Enterprise & Cloud Solutions

  - [**Enterprise Messaging:** Shift from technical features to business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create emotionally impactful content focused on high-level business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Key Phrase:** "Protecting your Salesforce investment."](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [**Cloud Solutions Messaging:** Subtly promote cloud solutions without denigrating the native product.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Focus:** Developer performance, usability, and scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Resource:** Sydnie's cloud vs. native one-pager will serve as a messaging guide.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Note:** This is an outbound-focused effort, not tied to the upcoming PLG motion.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### January Performance & Optimization

  - [**Security Content:** Performing strongly, ranking for broad security terms beyond "zero trust" with high average positions (on page 1).](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Keywords:** Expanding. GrowthX will optimize pages for keywords on page 2 of Google to drive more non-branded traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Compliance Content:** Refocusing technical articles for an executive audience to improve engagement (clicks) from high impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**AI Overview Win:** A Flosum article was the first citation in a Google AI Overview, a key win for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### Renewal & Reporting

  - [**Renewal:** The April renewal is on track. A formal strategy review with Garish is planned for mid-February.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [**Lead Tracking:** Matt uses a Looker dashboard to view first-touch sources (e.g., "ChatGPT") and then investigates specifics in Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sydnie:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Share the cloud vs. native one-pager with Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Share the "Shared Responsibility Model" white paper with Katya for content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [Schedule the renewal strategy call with Garish for mid-February.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
      - [Share CTA banner examples with Saakshi by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
      - [Brief Jessalyn on the new competitive and enterprise messaging strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Begin testing 1–2 competitive comparison articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Optimize pages for non-branded keywords on page 2 of Google.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Refocus compliance content for an executive audience.](https://fathom.video/share/cY3NaocGnzMutajRP7tJxSDxD1bsSjAT?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
